tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input:
{"code":"
(let [prs (github__list_pull_requests {:state "open"})
      repo-counts (frequencies (map :repo prs))
      top-repo (apply max-key val repo-counts)]
  {:total-open (count prs)
   :top-repo (first top-repo)
   :top-count (val top-repo)
   :all-repos repo-counts})
"}
